start-here/start-here-overview.title: Start Here — Overview
start-here/start-here-overview.content:
# Welcome to the Closing Clients System

Everything you need to run an outbound engine that books qualified sales calls, in six sequential steps. Follow them in order.

---

## The six steps

1. **Start Here** — you're on it. A 5-minute overview of the whole system so you know what you're building.
2. **Set Up Your Tech Stack** — buy and configure Instantly, leads, inboxes, warm-up. If we're doing your setup for you as part of DFY, this step is reference only — skim it if you want to understand what we built.
3. **Write Your Offer + Cold Email** — craft the offer, write the email, get both reviewed.
4. **Launch & Handle Replies** — send campaigns, manage inboxes, handle every reply type.
5. **Close & Onboard** — sales call playbook, contracts, onboarding new clients.
6. **Scale** — hire, systemise, and grow beyond what you can run yourself.

---

> **This step is a placeholder.** Real content is being migrated in — check back soon.

# Write Your Offer + Cold Email

Your offer is the single most important thing. This step walks you through crafting an offer strong enough to book calls from cold, then writing the email that gets it in front of the right people.
